intro: Dasistoma auriculata is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the broomrape family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties.
